ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

ruleScores.issue: Agent has 7 rules but checklist has 7 items with different format - uses checkboxes with question format instead of simple rule verification format

strengths: Complete YAML metadata with proper version, date, and comprehensive related agent boundaries
All 7 rules have proper severity [BLOCKER/CRITICAL/WARNING] and enforcement [BLOCKED/PREVENTED/REVIEWED] labels
Excellent Bad → Good code examples for every rule with concrete pseudocode
Clear boundary definitions with Architecture, Observability, and Security agents
Specific enforcement tools named (ESLint Custom Rules, React Query Mutation Linter, etc.)
Comprehensive Tool Integration table with coverage levels
Well-structured exceptions section with concrete override examples
gaps: Checklist format uses question-style items with checkboxes instead of simple rule verification format expected by automated tools
Some enforcement tools mentioned may not exist yet (Custom Linter, React Query Mutation Linter) - should clarify implementation status
